basics.name: Matheus de Paula
basics.label: Data Engineer | Software Engineer
basics.summary: Experienced Software Developer adept in the design, testing, and maintenance of software systems. As a back-end developer I build microservices-based applications, working mainly with Java, Kotlin, Python, the Spring Framework, MySQL, MongoDB, AWS, and Google Cloud. I value software quality — object-oriented good practices, design patterns, clean code, and tests — and I pick up new tools quickly.

work.name: Badal.io
work.summary: Designed and implemented scalable data governance frameworks and end-to-end observability pipelines (traces and metrics) across distributed systems.
highlights: Google Cloud (BigQuery, Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, IAM, Grafana, Tempo)

work.name: Nubank
work.summary: Developed and maintained large-scale financial systems for the Collections team at one of the world's largest digital banks (70M+ customers).

work.name: Hotmart
work.summary: Led a re-architecture of the sales integration system, significantly improving processing speed. Built a microservices-based authorization service for high-volume requests, migrated systems from monolith to microservices, and moved cloud infrastructure from ECS to Kubernetes (EKS).

work.name: Banco Inter
work.summary: Back-end developer on financial-sector projects, building Java microservices with the Spring Framework and PostgreSQL with strong unit-test coverage. Responsible for code review to maintain software quality.

work.name: Radix Engenharia e Software
work.summary: Started as an intern (2016) and grew into a full-stack developer role, working on large projects for the fuel industry with unit tests for software quality.
